info.description: This is the API server for the User Service.
info.title: User Service API

post.description: Authenticate a user and return access and refresh tokens via HttpOnly cookies.

put.description: Edit an existing comment by the author.

delete.description: Delete an existing comment by the author.

get.description: Retrieve notifications for the authenticated user.

put.description: Mark all notifications for the authenticated user as read.
Mark a specific notification as read.

get.description: Retrieve all posts for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new post for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve a specific post by its ID.

put.description: Update an existing post for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Soft delete a post for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new comment on a post.

get.description: Get the like count and the current user's like status for a post.

put.description: Verify old password and update to new password.

get.description: Get a user by their username.
Get the list of users following the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to follow another user.

delete.description: Allows an authenticated user to unfollow another user.

get.description: Get the list of users being followed by the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve all posts for a specific user by username.
